# 💸Why  I use Stripe in WordPress

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-12 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 928

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you looking to accept payments online?

As an entrepreneur, I always prefer Stripe to receive payments
from all my software businesses.

It’s less expensive and comes with a simple pricing structure,
unlike other processors like PayPal.

Unfortunately, unlike PayPal, setting up a Stripe payment gateway
on your website can be tricky, especially without a complex
shopping cart.

To help you find the right solution, my team put together a
detailed list 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..z4dKIWBnynZY0_-m99qcLPpZNuZMDK0NBtJbGGSNYcU )
 of the best Stripe plugins for WordPress.

Read the article and let me know your thoughts by replying to
this email.

Beyond Stripe: Finding Your Perfect Payment Solution
----------------------------------------------------

While Stripe is my go-to choice for most situations, it may not
be the right solution for everyone.

There are so many options available... from PayPal to Square to
newer services like Klarna. Each has its own pros and cons.

The key is understanding which processor fits your specific
business model, whether you're selling physical products, digital
downloads, or running a membership site.

Check out my ultimate guide 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jgVqmVvVLMlNZBfVQLhfzkBbp4J2LiPIEasZdC2VyQc )
 on WordPress payment processing.

This is what I recommend
------------------------

Need an easy solution to collect payments in WordPress?

Then I recommend installing the free WP Simple Pay plugin 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..yTpw4-oItgBeHDe9g-OM1Nea_hWzE50z1L3SrtDgswY ) on WordPress.org.

It lets you skip the hassle of complex shopping carts and start
collecting payments in minutes.

To waive the transactional fee, you can use the premium version
of WP Simple Pay ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.ePYuKzyBlMUmiw-514hj4iSRbPBulpZ-vzzJH7ZJ45I ).

What's holding you back from accepting payments online? Send me a
quick reply – I'm always here to help!

Have a great rest of the week :)

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
